text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Blue, blue, blue! Blue will calm me!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Everything's wrong! My heart's been pounding
like a drum and it just won't calm down!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking at something blue to try and calm
myself down, but it's not working at all! And the
waiting is stressing me out!
choice_data_list:
Maybe that just proves that you're eager to get
going.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...I'm eager? Oh, you're right! It's because I want
to run so badly I can't wait a second longer!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Okay, in that case, I'll go with red for passion
instead! Time to give it all I've got! ☆
